title: Clone-cam
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Clone-cam''' was a service that saw use by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. The helmets of the [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] serving within the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] each had a video recorder in them. Through these [[Cloning/Legends|clone]]-cam recorders, [[Officer/Legends|officers]] were able to monitor the activities of the clone troopers under their command through various computers and terminals that had been set up to access the broadcast feed.

During the [[Battle of Felucia (Outer Rim Sieges)/Legends|Battle of Felucia]], [[Drake Lo'gaan/Legends|Drake Lo'gaan]], [[Zonder/Legends|Zonder]], and [[Ekria/Legends|Ekria]] witnessed the [[Death/Legends|deaths]] of [[Aayla Secura/Legends|Aayla Secura]] and [[Barriss Offee/Legends|Barriss Offee]] during [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]] through clone-cam.

==Appearances==
*''[[Reversal of Fortune]]'' {{1st}}
